title: Ice And Fire Smithing
description: Progression-based smithing for the Ice And Fire mod.
body:
# ABOUT
Progression-based smithing for the Ice And Fire mod. This mod/datapack allows you to upgrade dragon bone tools and dragon scale armor to dragonsteel while being significantly cheaper.

Works for every major version of Ice And Fire since the smithing table was added: 1.16.1, 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.1.
* **NOW SUPPORTS BOTH ORIGINAL AND COMMUNITY EDITION OF THE ICE AND FIRE MOD**

![BH](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ca28c1bd-8c0e-4625-bda1-43965a48650c.webp)
# RECIPES
To create a dragonsteel ingot, you need a netherite ingot instead of an iron ingot in the Dragon Forge recipe.
![Dragonsteel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/750c34fdef3f869f27ad25381c46b2db45b8ac88.png)

You make the dragonsteel items in the same format as netherite tools. Use dragon bone tools or dragon scale armor as the base item, netherite smithing template, and dragonsteel ingot.
![Armor Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5cc07176fcfb0c2fb150414fa34adbf81520c49.png)
![Tool Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d131b78e2168fc3ef58ceb7bde5afeab7cb71d41.png)
